title: SearchQueryLedgerEntry
description: Input accepted by career_search_session log-query (and search_session.log_query). One entry per real web_search the bounded career-search-agent ran. The alias 'query' is normalized to 'query_text'; unknown top-level fields are rejected. This schema is the single source of truth shared by the CLI, the wrapper, and the skill references.

query_text.description: The actual query string searched. Inline alias: 'query'.

search_intent.description: What this query was trying to discover.

query_family.description: Query family label, typically derived from profile keywords.

derived_from.description: Provenance of the query (e.g. a prior query_id or JD term).

results_seen.description: Results observed for this query. url_hash is filled automatically.

new_terms_discovered.description: New terminology surfaced by this query, for query expansion.

source_type.description: Source type targeted by this query.

observed_failure_mode.description: Observed failure mode of this query.

valid_url_count.description: How many results were confirmed real JD pages (excludes search-result pages).

candidate_yield.description: How many candidates this query added to the pool.
